## Meeting Purpose

[Discuss potential partnership between Sendoso and GrowthX for content strategy and creation.](https://fathom.video/share/gisgvs5gLZuQavuiXa1U6TGYeB9JcwbD?tab=summary&timestamp=24.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Sendoso seeks to revitalize content strategy after 2-3 years of inactivity](https://fathom.video/share/gisgvs5gLZuQavuiXa1U6TGYeB9JcwbD?tab=summary&timestamp=531.0)
  - [GrowthX offers AI-powered content creation with human editorial oversight](https://fathom.video/share/gisgvs5gLZuQavuiXa1U6TGYeB9JcwbD?tab=summary&timestamp=39.0)
  - [Strategy sprint proposed for last week of June to kickstart potential collaboration](https://fathom.video/share/gisgvs5gLZuQavuiXa1U6TGYeB9JcwbD?tab=summary&timestamp=717.0)

## Topics

### Sendoso's Content Needs

  - [No aligned content strategy for 2-3 years](https://fathom.video/share/gisgvs5gLZuQavuiXa1U6TGYeB9JcwbD?tab=summary&timestamp=531.0)
  - [Aim to become a "content powerhouse" in relevant industries and ICPs](https://fathom.video/share/gisgvs5gLZuQavuiXa1U6TGYeB9JcwbD?tab=summary&timestamp=559.0)
  - [Focus on being thought leaders in direct mail and gifting for B2B SaaS](https://fathom.video/share/gisgvs5gLZuQavuiXa1U6TGYeB9JcwbD?tab=summary&timestamp=648.0)
  - [Explore expanding direct mail solutions to new industries](https://fathom.video/share/gisgvs5gLZuQavuiXa1U6TGYeB9JcwbD?tab=summary&timestamp=660.0)

### GrowthX's Capabilities

  - [AI-powered workflows for research, content creation, and visual assets](https://fathom.video/share/gisgvs5gLZuQavuiXa1U6TGYeB9JcwbD?tab=summary&timestamp=796.0)
  - [Human editorial team led by experienced managing directors](https://fathom.video/share/gisgvs5gLZuQavuiXa1U6TGYeB9JcwbD?tab=summary&timestamp=383.0)
  - [Comprehensive strategy sprint to define content direction](https://fathom.video/share/gisgvs5gLZuQavuiXa1U6TGYeB9JcwbD?tab=summary&timestamp=764.0)
  - [Ability to refresh existing content and create new material](https://fathom.video/share/gisgvs5gLZuQavuiXa1U6TGYeB9JcwbD?tab=summary&timestamp=1047.0)
  - [Examples: 5x traffic growth for Swoogle, custom dev projects for Bolt](https://fathom.video/share/gisgvs5gLZuQavuiXa1U6TGYeB9JcwbD?tab=summary&timestamp=1125.0)

### Content Creation Process

  - [Initial 8-week strategy sprint to define approach and create artifacts](https://fathom.video/share/gisgvs5gLZuQavuiXa1U6TGYeB9JcwbD?tab=summary&timestamp=764.0)
  - [Ongoing weekly meetings and collaborative content development](https://fathom.video/share/gisgvs5gLZuQavuiXa1U6TGYeB9JcwbD?tab=summary&timestamp=899.0)
  - [Potential for rapid scaling (18 articles in 2 months for Abnormal Security)](https://fathom.video/share/gisgvs5gLZuQavuiXa1U6TGYeB9JcwbD?tab=summary&timestamp=963.0)
  - [Flexibility to adapt to client needs (e.g., faster execution for Webflow and Ramp)](https://fathom.video/share/gisgvs5gLZuQavuiXa1U6TGYeB9JcwbD?tab=summary&timestamp=1564.0)

### Value Proposition

  - [Full editorial team at fraction of cost (\~$0.10-0.20/word vs. $2/word)](https://fathom.video/share/gisgvs5gLZuQavuiXa1U6TGYeB9JcwbD?tab=summary&timestamp=1440.0)
  - [Eliminates need to build in-house content team (est. 3-5 FTEs + freelancers)](https://fathom.video/share/gisgvs5gLZuQavuiXa1U6TGYeB9JcwbD?tab=summary&timestamp=1371.0)
  - [Augments existing strategy with execution capabilities](https://fathom.video/share/gisgvs5gLZuQavuiXa1U6TGYeB9JcwbD?tab=summary&timestamp=1410.0)
  - [Low-risk engagement model starting with strategy sprint](https://fathom.video/share/gisgvs5gLZuQavuiXa1U6TGYeB9JcwbD?tab=summary&timestamp=1643.0)

## Next Steps

  - [GrowthX to follow up and propose strategy sprint for last week of June](https://fathom.video/share/gisgvs5gLZuQavuiXa1U6TGYeB9JcwbD?tab=summary&timestamp=1689.0)
  - [Austin and Casey to align internally on moving forward](https://fathom.video/share/gisgvs5gLZuQavuiXa1U6TGYeB9JcwbD?tab=summary&timestamp=1702.0)
  - [Potential social media connection between Austin and Marcel](https://fathom.video/share/gisgvs5gLZuQavuiXa1U6TGYeB9JcwbD?tab=summary&timestamp=1716.0)
